name: coEmergency
title: coEmergency
syntax: void coEmergency( dword active, dword emcyError, byte specificData[], dword dataSize, dword errCode[] );
description: The function activates or deactivates an emergency error code. The error register [0x1003,0] and the 'Predefined error field' object are set. An emergency message is also sent.

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: Specifies whether an error code should be activated or deactivated0 - deactivates emergency state1 - activates emergency state2 - activates and deactivates automatically after a few seconds
